SCU_BCB_HHNDB45_C1AHS_v4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 79D
Recv ID: 7BD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 4D
Func Name: SCU

Auto IDents

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[P0852] Shift position sensor signal open failure (P1 and / or P2 >4.5V)"

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)"
